revision.text: 倭大国魂神社は、徳島県美馬市にある神社である。式内社倭大国魂神大国敷神社二座に比定される。
倭大国魂神社は、徳島県美馬市にある神社である。日本一社 延喜式式内社 阿波國美馬郡 倭大國魂神大國敷神社二座の論社の論社である。 鎮座地 徳島県美馬市美馬町重清字東宮上３

倭大国魂神社は、徳島県美馬市にある神社である。日本一社 延喜式式内社 阿波國美馬郡 倭大國魂神大國敷神社二座の論社の論社である。
鎮座地 徳島県美馬市美馬町重清字東宮上３
創建年代不詳。しかし、崇神天皇6年に皇居内より当地に移遷されたと見る向きもある。

revision.text:
{{draft}} {{Infobox Shinto shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = Yamatokunitama.jpg | caption = Torii[[ja:倭大国魂神社]] | coordinates = https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?language=ja&pagename=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE¶ms=34_2_56.9_N_134_1_1.5_E_type:landmark_region:JP&title=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE | deity = [[Yamato Okunitama]] }} {{出典の明記|date=2017年10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{神社 |名称 = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] |所在地 = [[Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = Japan Tokushima |祭神 = |神体 = |社格 = |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa
[[Mitsukashiwa|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa]] (Shrine crest) == Related Topics == * [[Yamato Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama God]] * [[Kunitama]] * [[List of Japanese deities]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Mima, Tokushima]] [[Category:History of Mima, Tokushima]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamato Okunitama Shrine}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Yamato clan]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:[[Category:Original pages]]]] }} {{Miwa and Yamato Faith}}

{{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{神社 |名称 = 倭大国魂神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|倭大国魂神社]] |所在地 = [[徳島県]][[美馬市]][[美馬町]]重清字東宮上3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = Japan Tokushima |祭神 = [[大国魂命]]
[[大己貴命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''倭大国魂神社'''（やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[美馬市]][[美馬町]]にある神社。 == 概要 == 創建年は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。 式内小社にある阿波國美馬郡の倭大國魂神大國敷神社二座の論社である。 この論定は「[[阿波志]]」によるもので、大国敷神社を医家神社とした上で「今別ち置く疑ふべし」と記載している[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 Marunimitsukashiwa.png|まるにみつかしわ
[[三つ柏|丸に三つ柏]]（神紋） == 祭神 == * [[大国魂命]] * [[大己貴命]] == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[美馬インターチェンジ]]」より車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]]「[[阿波半田駅]]」より車で約5分。 == 脚注 == {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やまとおおくにたましんしや}} [[Category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:美馬市の建築物]] [[Category:美馬市の歴史]]

[[大己貴命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''倭大国魂神社'''（やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[美馬市]][[美馬町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。 式内小社にある阿波國美馬郡の倭大國魂神大國敷神社二座の論社である。 この論定は「[[阿波志]]」によるもので、大国敷神社を医家神社とした上で「今別ち置く疑ふべし」と記載している[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 Marunimitsukashiwa.png|まるにみつかしわ

revision.text:
{{draft}} {{Infobox Shinto shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = Yamatokunitama.jpg | caption = Torii[[ja:倭大国魂神社]] | coordinates = https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?language=ja&pagename=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE¶ms=34_2_56.9_N_134_1_1.5_E_type:landmark_region:JP&title=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE | deity = [[Yamato Okunitama]] }} {{出典の明記|date=2017年10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{神社 |名称 = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] |所在地 = [[Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = Japan Tokushima |祭神 = |神体 = |社格 = |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa
[[Mitsukashiwa|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa]] (Shrine crest) == Related Topics == * [[Yamato Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama God]] * [[Kunitama]] * [[List of Japanese deities]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Mima, Tokushima]] [[Category:History of Mima, Tokushima]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamato Okunitama Shrine}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Yamato clan]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:[[Category:Original pages]]]] }} {{Miwa and Yamato Faith}}

{{draft}} {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{出典の明記|date=2017年10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = Yamatokunitama.jpg | caption = Torii[[ja:倭大国魂神社]] | coordinates = https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?language=ja&pagename=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE¶ms=34_2_56.9_N_134_1_1.5_E_type:landmark_region:JP&title=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE | deity = [[Yamato Okunitama]] |name = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |image = [[File:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | map国コード = JP | map = Japan Tokushima |deity = |神体 = |rank = |established = Unknown |main hall = |alternative name = |札所等 = |festival = |festival = }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa
[[Mitsukashiwa|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa]] (Shrine crest) == Related Topics == * [[Yamato Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama God]] * [[Kunitama]] * [[List of Japanese deities]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Mima, Tokushima]] [[Category:History of Mima, Tokushima]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamato Okunitama Shrine}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Yamato clan]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:[[Category:shinto shrines]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima}}[[category:shinto shrines]] [[Category:Expanded pages from wikipedia]] [[Category:Pages_from_Simple_English_Wikipedia]][[Category:Pages_from_Simple_English_Wikipedia]] [[en:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]]]] }} {{Miwa and Yamato Faith}}

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:35, 18 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{出典の明記|date=2017年10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = Yamatokunitama.jpg | caption = Torii[[Category:dd]][[ja:倭大国魂神社]] | coordinates = https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?language=ja&pagename=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE¶ms=34_2_56.9_N_134_1_1.5_E_type:landmark_region:JP&title=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE | deity = [[Yamato Okunitama]] |name = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |image = [[File:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | map国コード = JP | map = Japan Tokushima |deity = |神体 = |rank = |established = Unknown |main hall = |alternative name = |札所等 = |festival = |festival = }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:35, 18 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{出典の明記|date=2017年10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = Yamatokunitama.jpg | caption = Torii[[Category:dd]][[ja:倭大国魂神社]] | coordinates = https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?language=ja&pagename=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE¶ms=34_2_56.9_N_134_1_1.5_E_type:landmark_region:JP&title=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE | deity = [[Yamato Okunitama]] |name = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |image = [[File:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | map国コード = JP | map = Japan Tokushima |deity = |神体 = |rank = |established = Unknown |main hall = |alternative name = |札所等 = |festival = |festival = |deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]] }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama]] * [[Kunitama]] * [[List of Japanese deities]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Mima, Tokushima]] It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:35, 18 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{出典の明記|date=2017年10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = Yamatokunitama.jpg | caption = Torii[[ja:倭大国魂神社]] | coordinates = https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?language=ja&pagename=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE¶ms=34_2_56.9_N_134_1_1.5_E_type:landmark_region:JP&title=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE | deity = [[Yamato Okunitama]] |name = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |image = [[File:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | map国コード = JP | map = Japan Tokushima |deity = |神体 = |rank = |established = Unknown |main hall = |alternative name = |札所等 = |festival = |festival = |deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]] }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa
[[Mitsukashiwa|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa]] (Shrine crest) == See Also == * [[Ōyamato Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * {{ill|Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Minamiawaji|ja|大和大国魂神社}} (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama]] * [[Kunitama]] * [[List of Japanese deities]] {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Mima, Tokushima]] It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{神社 |名称 = 倭大国魂神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|倭大国魂神社]] |所在地 = [[徳島県]][[美馬市]][[美馬町]]重清字東宮上3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = Japan Tokushima |祭神 = [[大国魂命]]
[[大己貴命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''倭大国魂神社'''（やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[美馬市]][[美馬町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。 式内小社にある阿波國美馬郡の倭大國玉神大國敷神社二座の論社である。 この論定は「[[阿波志]]」によるもので、大国敷神社を医家神社とした上で「今別ち置く疑ふべし」と記載している[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 Marunimitsukashiwa.png|まるにみつかしわ
[[三つ柏|丸に三つ柏]]（神紋） == 祭神 == * [[大国魂命]] * [[大己貴命]] == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[美馬インターチェンジ]]」より車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]]「[[阿波半田駅]]」より車で約5分。 == 脚注 == {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やまとおおくにたましんしや}} [[Category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:美馬市の建築物]] [[Category:美馬市の歴史]]

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

revision.comment: 27 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:倭大国魂神社 up to rev 104359010
revision.text:
{{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{神社 |名称 = 倭大国魂神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|倭大国魂神社]] |所在地 = [[徳島県]][[美馬市]][[美馬町]]重清字東宮上3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP | 地図 = Japan Tokushima |祭神 = [[大国魂命]]
[[大己貴命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''倭大国魂神社'''（やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[美馬市]][[美馬町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。 式内小社にある阿波國美馬郡の倭大國玉神大國敷神社二座の論社である。 この論定は「[[阿波志]]」によるもので、大国敷神社を医家神社とした上で「今別ち置く疑ふべし」と記載している[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 Marunimitsukashiwa.png|まるにみつかしわ
[[三つ柏|丸に三つ柏]]（神紋） == 祭神 == * [[大国魂命]] * [[大己貴命]] == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[美馬インターチェンジ]]」より車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]]「[[阿波半田駅]]」より車で約5分。 == 脚注 == {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やまとおおくにたましんしや}} [[Category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:美馬市の建築物]] [[Category:美馬市の歴史]]

[[大己貴命]] |神体 = |社格 = [[式内社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''倭大国魂神社'''（やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[美馬市]][[美馬町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。 == 歴史 == 創建年は不詳『[[角川日本地名大辞典]] 36 徳島県』（[[1986年]] ISBN 4040013603）。 式内小社にある阿波國美馬郡の倭大國玉神大國敷神社二座の論社である。 この論定は「[[阿波志]]」によるもので、大国敷神社を医家神社とした上で「今別ち置く疑ふべし」と記載している[[2000年]],[[平凡社]]『徳島県の地名』。 Marunimitsukashiwa.png|まるにみつかしわ
[[三つ柏|丸に三つ柏]]（神紋） == 祭神 == * [[大国魂命]] * [[大己貴命]] == 交通 == * [[徳島自動車道]]「[[美馬インターチェンジ]]」より車で約5分。 * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]]「[[阿波半田駅]]」より車で約5分。 == 脚注 == {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やまとおおくにたましんしや}} [[Category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:美馬市の建築物]] [[Category:美馬市の歴史]]

{{afc comment|1=see [[every:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] for the history[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:26, 31 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=page was originally created in the draft namespace on english wikipedia. The entire simple english wikipedia history is present, but the wikipedia draft can be found on everybodywiki here [[every:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima|Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] and should be undeleted here on wikipedia [[:en:draft:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] and have the revisions imported to this wiki to give proper attribution. While most edits are by Immanuelle there might be a few from other users. While most edits are by Immanuelle there might be a few from other users. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:35, 18 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{draft}} [[Category:Completion tier 7]] {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{出典の明記|date=2017th year 10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = Yamatokunitama.jpg | caption = Torii | coordinates = https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?language=ja&pagename=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE¶ms=34_2_56.9_N_134_1_1.5_E_type:landmark_region:JP&title=%E5%80%AD%E5%A4%A7%E5%9B%BD%E9%AD%82%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE | deity = [[Yamato Okunitama]] |name = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |image = [[File:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg|250px|Yamato Okunitama Shrine]] |location = [[Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | map国コード = JP | map = Japan Tokushima |deity = |神体 = |Rank = |established = Unknown |main hall = |alternative name = |札所等 = |festival = |festival = |deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[Yamato Okunitama]] }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa
[[Mitsukashiwa|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa]] (Shrine crest) == See Also == * [[Ōyamato Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * {{ill|Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Minamiawaji|ja|大和大国魂神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[Yamato Okunitama]] * [[Kunitama]] * [[List of Japanese deities]] {{Shinto-stub}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] ]] }} {{Miwa and Yamato Faith}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{Source Wikipedia}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Mima, Tokushima]] [[Category:History of Mima, Tokushima]] [[Category:Yamato clan]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:shinto shrines]] [[Category:Expanded pages from Wikipedia]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[Category:Pages from Simple English Wikipedia]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Simple english wikipedia and everybodywiki]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]][[Category:qq]] }} [[en:draft:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[ja:倭大国魂神社]] [[sn:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[en:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[sn:amato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamato Okunitama Shrine}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima}} [[Category:Ambox transclusions]] {{translated page|ja|倭大国魂神社|version=104359010|comment=Imported full ja history}}

This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:35, 18 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{出典の明記|date=2017th year 10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = File:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg | caption = Torii | coordinates = {{Coord|34.049139|N|134.017083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = [[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]] |name = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |location = [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | map国コード = JP | map = Japan Tokushima |deity = |神体 = |Rank = |established = Unknown |main hall = |alternative name = |札所等 = |festival = |festival = |deity=[[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]] |prefecture= {{ill|Mima|qid=Q857828}} }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa
[[Mitsukashiwa|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa]] (Shrine crest) == See Also == * [[Ōyamato Shrine]] (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * {{ill|Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Minamiawaji|ja|大和大国魂神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Minamiawaji|qq=}} (Shikinaisha Myojin Taisha) * [[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]] * [[Kunitama]] * [[:en:List of Japanese deities|List of Japanese deities]] {{Shinto-stub}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Miwa and Yamato Faith}} {{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}} {{translated page|ja|倭大国魂神社|version=104359010|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[simple:user:immanuelle/Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]]}} [[every:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[every:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima|Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[sn:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[ja:倭大国魂神社]] [[sn:amato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] [[Category:everybodywiki import successful]][[sn:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]][[Category:everybodywiki import successful]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Mima, Tokushima]] [[Category:History of Mima, Tokushima]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] {{Commons category|Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima}} [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

The entire simple english wikipedia history is present, but the wikipedia draft can be found on everybodywiki here and should be undeleted here on wikipedia [[:en:draft:Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima]] and have the revisions imported to this wiki to give proper attribution. While most edits are by Immanuelle there might be a few from other users. [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:35, 18 February 2025 (UTC)}} {{otheruses|徳島県美馬市にある神社|兵庫県南あわじ市にある神社|大和大国魂神社}} {{Referencesの明記|date=2017th year 10月11日 (水) 06:26 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | image = File:Torii of Yamato Okunitama Shrine, Mima.jpg | caption = Torii | coordinates = {{Coord|34.049139|N|134.017083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = [[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]] |name = Yamato Okunitama Shrine |location = [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]][[Mima, Tokushima|Mima City]], Mima-cho, Shigekiyo Aza Higashimiyaue 3 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 2 | 緯度秒 = 56.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 1 | 経度秒 = 1.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | map国コード = JP | map = Japan Tokushima |deity = |神体 = |Rank = |established = Unknown |main hall = |alternative name = |札所等 = |festival = |festival = |deity=[[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]]|deity=[[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Yamato Okunitama]] |prefecture= {{ill|Mima|WD=Q857828}} }} '''Yamato Okunitama Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]]. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa

Shrine''' (やまとおおくにたまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in [[Mima City]], {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is one of the proposed locations of the ancient shrines "Ichisha Shikinaisha Awa Kuni Mima District Yamato Okunitama God Okuni Shikinaisha Niza". This identification is based on the "Awa-shi" (records of Awa Province), which suggests the shrine could be "Ike Shrine" and adds that there may be doubt about distinguishing them as separate entities. == Overview == The exact date of establishment is unknown. == Gallery == Marunimitsukashiwa.png|Maru ni Mitsukashiwa
